critical_finding: Screen1 trigger prompt has no Phase-0 mandatory data collection. Sub-agents default to training data (07K) instead of real price (6,981). Direction was WRONG: LONG vs SHORT actual.
p0_fix: Insert Phase-0 Tavily data collection before A1/A2/A3 spawn. Hard block if data unavailable.
